title: L1 Trace Element Solution
author: Christa Smith
license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.jvqcn5w

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of MnCl 2 ·4H 2 O (178.10 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of ZnSO 4 ·7H 2 O (23.00 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of CoCl 2 ·6H 2 O (11.90 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of CuSO 4 ·5H 2 O (2.50 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of Na 2 MoO 4 ·2H 2 O (19.90 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of H 2 SeO 3 (1.29 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of NiSO 4 ·6H 2 O (2.63 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of...
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of Na 3 VO 4 (1.84 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Add 1 mL primary stock of K 2 CrO (1
steps.instruction: Add 1 mL primary stock of K 2 CrO (1.94 g/L in dH 2 O) into the bottle.

steps.title: Bring final volume to 1 L with dH 2 O
steps.instruction: Bring final volume to 1 L with dH 2 O.

steps.title: Meausre 950 mL dH 2 O...
steps.instruction: Meausre 950 mL dH 2 O into a 1 L glass bottle.

steps.title: Filter sterilize final trace element solution through a 0
steps.instruction: Filter sterilize final trace element solution through a 0.2 micron PES membrane.

steps.title: Dissolve 3
steps.instruction: Dissolve 3.15 g FeCl 3 ·6H 2 O into the bottle.

steps.title: Dissolve 4
steps.instruction: Dissolve 4.36 g Na 2 EDTA·2H 2 O into the bottle.
